displayTitle: Four Words That Decide Every Film

beats.narration: Four words decide every film you sign, and nearly every technique lever moves two of them at once. Level Two is trading deliberately.

payload.title: FOUR WORDS
payload.sub: The four parameters that judge every radiograph.

beats.narration: Density is the platform. Contrast is the size of the signal. Definition is how cleanly edges are drawn. Sensitivity is the proven outcome.
Codes window density, about one point eight to four for x ray, because film contrast, the curve's gradient, collapses low and climbs with density.

payload.heading: Film contrast lives on the curve

beats.narration: The I Q I proves sensitivity. Two dash two T: a plaque two percent of part thickness whose two T hole must show.
Move one lever at a time, watch all four, then let the I Q I, read at proper density, call the balance.

payload.sub: Read at proper density, the indicator calls the balance.
